ddls:
CREATE TABLE "corset_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corset size */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the corset (e.g., 18, 20, 22) */,
  "bust_min" INTEGER /* Minimum bust measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "bust_max" INTEGER /* Maximum bust measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "waist_min" INTEGER /* Minimum waist measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "waist_max" INTEGER /* Maximum waist measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "hip_min" INTEGER /* Minimum hip measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "hip_max" INTEGER /* Maximum hip measurement when the corset is fully closed (in inches) */,
  "natural_waist_min" INTEGER /* Minimum natural waist measurement for which the corset is suitable (in inches) */,
  "natural_waist_max" INTEGER /* Maximum natural waist measurement for which the corset is suitable (in inches) */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the corset */,
  "recommended_body_type" TEXT /* Recommended body type for the corset size */,
  "recommended_activity_level" TEXT /* Recommended activity level for the corset size */,
  "recommended_use_case" TEXT /* Recommended use case for the corset size */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used for the corset */,
  "color_options" TEXT /* Color options available for the corset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corset_sizes_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES corset_styles ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corset_styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corset style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the corset style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the corset style */,
  "history" TEXT /* History and inspiration behind the corset style */,
  "occasion" TEXT /* Recommended occasion for the corset style */,
  "accessories" TEXT /* Recommended accessories for the corset style */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the corset style */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Customer's bust measurement (in inches) */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Customer's waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Customer's hip measurement (in inches) */,
  "natural_waist" INTEGER /* Customer's natural waist measurement (in inches) */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred contact method of the customer */,
  "measurement_preferences" TEXT /* Measurement preferences of the customer */,
  "order_history" TEXT /* Order history of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program information of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Delivery date for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corset size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the item */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES corset_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions and access levels for the user role */,
  "hierarchy" TEXT /* Hierarchy and relationships of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the customer */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the role assignment */,
  "assignment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the role assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
